nasb.text: He numbered them in Bezek; and the sons of Israel were 300,000, and the men of Judah 30,000.

esv.text: When he mustered them at Bezek, the people of Israel were three hundred thousand, and the men of Judah thirty thousand.

cnv.text: 掃羅在比色數點他們。以色列人共有三十萬，猶大人有三萬。

ccb.text: 扫罗在比色统计以色列人，共有三十万，从犹大来的有三万。
